titles.title: Your Ways are Higher than Mine

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C5

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: It's not what I prayed for It's not what I wanted It's not something I understand My circumstances seem so confusing I'm placing it all in Your hands

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Your ways are higher than mine I want mountains to move You want me to climb So I'm gonna trust Your work, Your will, and Your time Your ways are higher than mine

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: One day I'm sure I will look back and marvel At how You knew best all along You see from Heaven You know it's the hard times That make my face steady and strong

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When I start to doubt, help me believe Somewhere, so far above me

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: Your ways are higher than mine I want mountains to move You want me to climb So I'm gonna trust Your work, Your will, and Your time Oh Your ways are so much higher than mine Your ways are higher than mine
